title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! This is incredible! I can't believe you were
able to scout so many talented ponies!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: You might have a real knack for producing plays.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: No need to be humble. Hark—can't you hear?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
The audience is cheering loudly for your skilled
direction.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Now, it's time for the curtain call! Hold hands,
everyone. The curtain is rising!
